title: Upload Kelvin SmartApp™ to Kelvin Platform
content:
# Upload Kelvin SmartApp™ to Kelvin Platform

Once you have finished writing and testing your new Kelvin SmartApp™ Application, then you need to upload it to the App Registry on the Kelvin Platform.

After uploading it, you will see it listed in the **Applications** section where you can then add Assets to it in the **Workloads** Tab.

    When you upload, by default it will be placed in the Kelvin SmartApp™ group.

    You can change this default location for all users by defining its group in the `category` key in the `app.yaml` file.

To upload you can follow the [Application Quick Start Guide for Upload](../../quick-start/how-to/upload-kelvin-smartapp.md).
